'''''Pizzazz'' 7''' is the seventh issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[April]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.

The cover is UFO themed, in reference to the issue's featured article, and includes [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] alongside an alien from [[Wikipedia:Close Encounters of the Third Kind|''Close Encounters of the Third Kind'']] and [[Wikipedia:Spock|Mr. Spock]] from [[Wikipedia:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']]. The issue also features an ad and order form to join the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Official Star Wars Fan Club]].<ref name="Issue 7" />
